description_long: This is a life-sized figure of an adult woman standing upright with a confident and elegant posture. She is wearing a long, form-fitting evening gown with a strapless or thin-strapped bodice and a skirt that drapes to the floor, featuring some tattered or distressed elements at the hem. Her arms are bent, with one hand resting on her hip and the other across her waist, suggesting a poised and self-assured demeanor. The figure's hair is styled in an elaborate updo, with visible curls and volume at the back. The surface of the figure is smooth, with realistic anatomical proportions and subtle texturing on the clothing and hair. There are no visible accessories or carried objects, and the figure appears to be intended as a realistic representation of a pedestrian adult in an urban environment.
description: A standing adult woman in a long, elegant evening gown with an updo hairstyle and a confident, poised posture. The figure features realistic proportions and detailed clothing textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woman's face, upper body, and the detailed bodice of the gown with both arms visible.
description_view_1: Three-quarter view highlighting the side profile of the face, the arm across the waist, and the draping of the gown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the updo hairstyle, the gown's back details, and the hand on the hip.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the gown's draping and tattered hem, as well as the hairstyle's volume.
attribute_clothing_type: formal evening gown with a fitted bodice and long, draped skirt featuring distressed hem
attribute_posture: standing upright with one hand on hip and the other across waist
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in an elaborate updo with curls
